name: SplatDropper
description: [SplatDropper](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1232) is a loader that utilizes native windows API to deliver its payload to the victim environment.  [SplatDropper](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1232) has been delivered through RAR archives and used legitimate executable for DLL side-loading.  [SplatDropper](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1232) is known to be leveraged by [Mustang Panda
